response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified song 'ABOVE BELOW' by Hololive English -Justice- through on-screen lyrics and web search. 2. Performed search to retrieve full lyrics. 3. Divided the performance into two scenes based on the significant musical structure change at 02:30.
response.global_summary: A performance video featuring Hololive English VTubers singing their original song 'ABOVE BELOW'.

scenes.description: The song 'ABOVE BELOW' begins with the performers dancing on stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: don't, don't know me, unpredictable . . . takin' you all below, takin' you all be — don't, don't know me, irresistible takin' you all below, below we go they think they want it? (huh?) they wanna ge - get down we take 'em down, down, down queendom in the borderline run it, no surprise you ain't gonna win but you can try told ya, you got no luck end up in my lineup, listen, listen run, oh, hide and scream out, already locked ya up fool's games you always play call me corrupt, won't hear anything aiming my sight down right on your heart throw in' the keys out, shut down, i - i - i (justice) love it, the forbidden (just like that) you 're never forgiven (justice) not one to just forget (get, get that) we got 'em the higher i rise, down further you dive stand in' on the edge, don't know me, unpredictable, typical, you got nowhere to go, show you somethin' real, my level no you'll never know, as above so below, you should know (du - du - ru - du - ru - du) ha - ha, ah (woo, woo, woo) we got it, hey run in the light, oh, my dio what 's wrong, what 's right? rush in' in a fantasy wanna be disease sure that you won't ever make it out eyes follow now do it, do it new target locked on it now (now) enemies? girl, i lost count (uh) see your guilty heart we 're not gonna stop, it 's just the start ooh get down get da - ra - da like it like that? run it like that get down (get down, down, down, hey) takin' me up, up, up, let 's go goin' above, go below told ya, you already know don't ya (they know it) run in the light, oh, my dio what 's wrong, what 's right with you? run in the night, oh, my dio come take a bite (never ending, endless sky) (justice) love it, the forbidden (just like that) you 're never forgiven (justice) not one to just forget (get, get that) we rise (wow, yeah, we ride, ride, ride) stand in' on the edge, don't know me, unpredictable, typical, you got nowhere to go, show you somethin' real, my level no you'll never know, as above so below, you should know (so let 's go) just a little unpredictable, beautiful just the start, let 's get it, let 's get ' em baby go, next level, almost criminal, as above so it goes below
